subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — I enjoyed our conversation at the conference and I'm glad you followed up.

I'd be delighted to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are some slots that work well on our end:

  • Tuesday, 21 April 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 22 April 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 23 April 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Any of those work for you? Just let me know your preference and I'll send over a calendar invite.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information directly. Once we've had our initial call and there's a clear path forward, I'd be happy to facilitate the right introductions through the proper channels.

Thanks again for reaching out, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
